versions.changelog_entry: 7-phase sequenced implementation plan addressing all 92 items from the forensic punch list (M-01 through N-06). Phases ordered by dependency and severity: Phase 0 (blockers/prerequisites), Phase 1 (methodology), Phase 2 (data quality), Phase 3 (code quality/reproducibility), Phase 4 (logging), Phase 5 (testing), Phase 6 (infrastructure), Phase 7 (nits). Includes exact CLI commands, human-decision flags, dependency graph, and first concrete next step. Total estimated effort: 4-6 weeks.
